# Siemens Official Documentation Index

This file indexes official Siemens documentation for S7-1200, S7-1500, and TIA Portal.

## Primary Documentation Sources

### Siemens Industry Online Support
- Main portal: https://support.industry.siemens.com
- S7-1200 manuals: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/ww/en/ps/13683/man
- S7-1500 manuals: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/ww/en/ps/13716/man
- STEP 7 (TIA Portal) manuals: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/ww/en/ps/14673/man
- ET 200SP CPU manuals: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/ww/en/ps/13888/man

### Official Programming Guidelines and Style Guides

#### Programming Guideline for S7-1200/S7-1500
- Entry ID: 81318674
- Latest version: V1.6 (12/2018)
- Direct link: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/ww/en/view/81318674
- PDF download: https://support.industry.siemens.com/cs/attachments/90885040/81318674_Programming_guideline_DOC_v16_en.pdf
- Covers:
  - S7-1200/1500 innovations and features
  - Processor-optimized data storage
  - Data types and addressing
  - Program structure (OB, FC, FB, DB)
  - Instruction usage and best practices
  - Communication with optimized data
  - MOVE and VARIANT instructions

#### Programming Styleguide for S7-1200/S7-1500
- Entry ID: 81318674 (same entry, different document)
- Latest version: V1.2 (10/2016)
- PDF download: https://cache.industry.siemens.com/dl/files/084/109478084/att_900353/v1/81318674_Programming_Styleguide_DOC_v12_en.pdf
- Covers:
  - Naming conventions (camelCasing, PascalCasing)
  - Identifier rules and prefixes
  - FB/FC/DB naming standards
  - Library organization
  - PLC data types naming
  - Constants and tags naming

#### Safety Programming Guideline for S7-1200/S7-1500
- Entry ID: 109750255
- Version: V1.0 (10/2017)
- PDF download: https://assets.new.siemens.com/siemens/assets/api/uuid:1a7ce755-79a1-494e-ae14-5e5f72c29205/safety-programming-guideline-for-simatic-s7-1200-and-1500.pdf
- Covers:
  - Safety program structure
  - F-runtime groups
  - Data exchange between standard and safety programs
  - Diagnostic and message information handling

## Document Organization

### By Topic
- **Programming fundamentals**: Programming Guideline, Easy Book, Getting Started guides
- **Code style and conventions**: Programming Styleguide
- **Safety programming**: Safety Programming Guideline
- **Instruction reference**: Extended Instructions online docs, Comparison List
- **Hardware**: System manuals, technical specifications
- **Libraries**: LGF, LPD libraries

### By Controller Family
- **S7-1200**: Entry 13683, Easy Book, Getting Started 39644875
- **S7-1500**: Entry 13716, Getting Started 78027451, System Manual
- **Both platforms**: Programming Guideline 81318674, Programming Styleguide, Safety Guideline

## Usage Notes

1. Always check the Siemens Industry Online Support portal for the latest versions
2. Entry IDs are stable identifiers for documentation across versions
3. PDF downloads may require free registration on Siemens support portal
4. Online documentation at docs.tia.siemens.cloud is version-specific (check URL for version)
5. Programming Guideline and Styleguide are essential reading for any S7-1200/1500 project

## Evidence Priority

When answering Siemens-specific questions, use sources in this order:
1. Official manuals and guidelines listed above
2. TIA Portal online documentation
3. Siemens application examples and libraries
4. IEC 61131-3 standards (for language-level questions)
5. Community resources (lowest priority)
